summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Delete Score feature. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working for delete score button, confirmation dialog, score removal, and handicap recalculation.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Backend: DELETE /api/scores/{score_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent score
Backend: DELETE /api/scores/{score_id} - Endpoint exists and is accessible
Backend: DELETE /api/scores/{score_id} - Create and delete score flow works
Backend: DELETE /api/scores/{score_id} - Recalculates player handicap after deletion
Backend: DELETE /api/scores/{score_id} - Removes score from leaderboard
Backend: DELETE /api/rounds/{round_id} - Cascade deletes scores and recalculates handicaps
Backend: Existing scores are accessible via API
Backend: Player handicap history contains round entries
Frontend: Delete score button (trash icon) visible next to Edit button
Frontend: Delete button has correct styling (red/destructive color)
Frontend: Confirmation dialog appears when clicking delete
Frontend: Dialog message includes player name and mentions handicap recalculation
Frontend: Score is removed after confirming deletion
Frontend: Success toast 'Nathan D's score removed' displayed
Frontend: Leaderboard updates after score deletion
Frontend: Handicap recalculated after score deletion (17.2 -> 16.9)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend DELETE /api/scores/{score_id} endpoint properly removes score and recalculates handicap
Backend correctly removes handicap history entry for deleted score
Backend DELETE /api/rounds/{round_id} properly cascades to delete scores and recalculate handicaps
Frontend delete button correctly positioned next to Edit button with trash icon
Frontend uses browser confirm() dialog for deletion confirmation - works correctly
Frontend properly refreshes data after deletion via onRefresh callback
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)
seed_data_creation: Test round 'TEST_DeleteRound' was created and cleaned up during testing. No permanent test data remains.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delete Score feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoint: DELETE /api/scores/{score_id} removes score and recalculates player handicap.
